header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: Will there be cleaning service on Holidays and Khmer New Year?
items.answer: bEasy operates all day including the New Year. We recommend booking your services a few days in advance to secure your slot. Extra charges will be added during holidays.

items.question: How long does it take to book a service from bEasy?
items.answer: Booking with our app has never been easier! A service booking can be done in as fast as 30 seconds.

items.question: I do not know the size of my house. Can I still book a service?
items.answer: Yes you absolutely can! If you do not know the size of your house, just assume an estimate of the size. The cleaners will advise you if any changes have to be made upon arrival.

items.question: What are the time frames to book with bEasy?
items.answer: bEasy is available for booking from 10:00 to 18:00

header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: What is the difference between Deep Cleaning and General Cleaning?
items.answer: Our Deep Cleaning services are suitable for customers who want to ensure hidden grime and dirt are tackled to give your home a complete restart.

items.question: Can I book Deep Cleaning for post renovation cleaning?
items.answer: Deep Cleaning does not cover post renovation cleanups. Please book our Post Renovation Cleaning Service instead!

items.question: Will hard to reach areas be cleaned too?
items.answer: Yes! Our cleaners will reach every area of your home to ensure a complete clean and fresh restart.

items.question: Will you clean the inside of furniture and electrical appliances?
items.answer: bEasy is available for booking from 10:00 to 18:00

header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: What types of upholstery do you clean?
items.answer: We clean fabric and felt sofas, leather sofas, mattresses, rugs, and carpets.

items.question: How often should upholstery be cleaned?
items.answer: Generally every 6–12 months, depending on usage, pets, children, and environment. High-traffic areas may need more frequent cleaning.

items.question: What cleaning methods do you use?
items.answer: We use a combination of dry vacuuming, specialised cleaning solution, scrubbing, and wet vacuuming.

items.question: Can all stains be removed?
items.answer: We can remove most stains, but some deep or old stains (e.g., dye transfer, permanent ink) may not fully disappear. We’ll do our best to remove those stains.

items.question: Is the cleaning safe for children and pets?
items.answer: Yes. Our cleaning solutions are non-toxic and safe once the upholstery is dry.

items.question: How long does the upholstery take to dry?
items.answer: Typically 4–6 hours, depending on ventilation and fabric thickness. Leather items dry faster.

items.question: Do I need to prepare anything before the cleaners arrive?
items.answer: Just remove loose items (pillows, toys, small objects). We’ll handle the rest. No heavy lifting needed from you.

items.question: Can I sit on the sofa immediately after cleaning?
items.answer: We recommend waiting until the upholstery is fully dry to avoid re-soiling or damaging the fabric.

items.question: Can upholstery shrink or get damaged?
items.answer: No. Our cleaning solution is material friendly and will not damage any of your upholstery.

items.question: Do you offer a warranty or guarantee?
items.answer: We guarantee best-effort stain removal and safe handling. However, results may vary depending on age, fabric, and existing damage.

items.question: Can you remove mould from upholstery?
items.answer: Yes, light mould can be treated due to our heat treatment however, severe mould that has penetrated deep into the padding may not be fully recoverable.

header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: What types of pests do you handle?
items.answer: We treat common pests such as ants, cockroaches, mosquitoes, flies, rats, mice, termites, and other crawling or flying insects.

items.question: Are your pest control chemicals safe?
items.answer: Yes. All chemicals used are eco-friendly where possible, and safe for homes, pets, and children once the treated area has dried.

items.question: Do I need to leave the house during treatment?
items.answer: For most general treatments, staying at home is fine. For cold fogging, we may recommend leaving for 1–3 hours for safety and ventilation.

items.question: How long does the treatment take?
items.answer: Typically 60-120 minutes, depending on the size of the space and type of pest.

items.question: How long before I see results?
items.answer: You may see immediate reduction, but full results usually appear within 3–7 days as the chemicals take effect on hidden pests.

items.question: How long does the effect of the treatment last?
items.answer: Typically 1–3 months, depending on the environment, hygiene level, and pest type.

items.question: What should I do to prepare before the treatment?
items.answer: Cover or store exposed food; remove baby toys and pet bowls; clear areas where pests are commonly seen; and for kitchens, clear the sink and surfaces if possible. We’ll advise you based on your pest situation.

items.question: Will I still see pests after treatment?
items.answer: Yes, you may notice some pests coming out of hiding for a few days—this is normal. The chemicals flush them out before fully eliminating them.

items.question: Do you handle termite problems?
items.answer: Yes. Termite treatment requires specialised solutions and may involve gel baits, barrier treatment, or drilling/injection methods depending on severity.

items.question: Is pest control necessary even if I only see a few pests?
items.answer: Yes. A few visible pests often mean a hidden colony nearby. Early treatment prevents bigger infestations and saves costs.

items.question: How do I prevent pests from returning?
items.answer: Keep surfaces clean and dry; seal food properly; clear clutter and garbage daily; repair leaks; and schedule regular preventive treatments.

items.question: Do you provide post-treatment instructions?
items.answer: Yes. We will share clear aftercare steps such as: avoiding mopping treated areas for 24 hours, maintaining good hygiene, monitoring for unusual pest activity, and keeping windows open for ventilation if chemicals smell strong.

header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: Why do I need to clean my washing machine?
items.answer: Detergent residue, fabric softener, dirt, mould, and bacteria can build up over time, causing bad odours, poor washing performance, and potential damage to clothes.

items.question: How often should a washing machine be cleaned?
items.answer: For regular use, we recommend cleaning every 6 months. Homes with children, pets, or frequent laundry may need monthly cleaning.

items.question: What types of washing machines do you clean?
items.answer: We clean: Top-load washing machines, Front-load washing machines, Washer–dryer combos, and Semi-automatic machines.

items.question: Do you dismantle the washing machine?
items.answer: Yes, partial dismantling is done when necessary (e.g., remove gasket, filters, covers). Full dismantling is only done if required and safe for the model.

items.question: Is the service safe for all machine brands?
items.answer: Yes. We handle all major brands (LG, Samsung, Panasonic, Hitachi, Toshiba, etc.) and use methods suitable for each design.

items.question: How long does the cleaning take?
items.answer: Typically 120 minutes, depending on machine type and dirt level.

items.question: Do you fix washing machine issues or only clean?
items.answer: Our service focuses on cleaning, not technical repairs. However, we will inform you if we spot issues (e.g., worn gasket, leaking hoses).

items.question: Will cleaning remove mould and bad odours?
items.answer: Yes. Cleaning helps remove mould and bacteria buildup, which typically eliminates 90–100% of odours unless there is deeper internal damage.

items.question: Do I need to prepare anything beforehand?
items.answer: Please: Empty the machine, ensure water and power supply are accessible, and clear the area around the machine if possible.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the service?
items.answer: Yes, at least one person must be present to allow access and check the machine after cleaning.

items.question: How do I maintain my washing machine after professional cleaning?
items.answer: Leave the door open after each wash to reduce moisture, clean the filter monthly, wipe the gasket weekly, avoid overloading, and use recommended detergents.

items.question: Will my clothes smell better after the cleaning?
items.answer: Absolutely. Removing dirt buildup and mould significantly improves washing results and removes stale smells from clothes.

items.question: Can professional cleaning extend the life of the machine?
items.answer: Yes. Regular cleaning reduces strain on the motor, pump, and drum, helping the machine run more efficiently and last longer.

items.question: Is your cleaning eco-friendly?
items.answer: We use safe, non-toxic cleaning agents that effectively remove dirt without harming the machine or the environment.

header.subtitle: FAQ
header.title: Everything You Need to Know
header.description: Quick answers to your most common questions–so you can book, manage, and enjoy our cleaning service with ease.

items.question: What is included in a post-renovation cleaning service?
items.answer: Post-renovation cleaning typically includes: removal of dust, debris, and construction residue; deep cleaning of floors, walls, and built-in items; cleaning of windows, frames, and tracks; wiping all surfaces (cabinets, counters, shelves); bathroom and kitchen sanitation; vacuuming and mopping of all areas; and disposal of small renovation debris. (Heavy debris removal may incur additional charges.)

items.question: Why do I need post-renovation cleaning?
items.answer: Renovation dust is very fine and can spread everywhere, including inside cabinets, lighting fixtures, air vents, and window tracks. A professional team ensures the home is safe, clean, and ready for move-in.

items.question: How long does post-renovation cleaning take?
items.answer: Depending on the size and condition of the property, it usually takes 4–8 hours or may require a full-day team.

items.question: How many cleaners will come?
items.answer: Depending on the type of location, 2-6 cleaners will perform the cleaning.

items.question: Do I need to be present during the cleaning?
items.answer: It’s optional. You can choose to be present or come during the final inspection to check the work.

items.question: Can I book post-renovation cleaning before the contractor finishes work?
items.answer: It is a must to book after all renovation work is completed, including touch-ups. Ongoing construction creates new dust and debris that will affect the cleaning results.

items.question: Do you remove paint stains, cement, and silicone marks?
items.answer: Yes, we remove light paint stains, grout haze, and cement dust. Heavy paint drips, silicone residue, or hardened cement will require specialised treatment and may incur extra charges.

items.question: Can the cleaning completely remove renovation dust?
items.answer: We aim for 95–100% dust removal, but renovation dust is very fine. Some dust may still settle a few days after due to air movement. A quick follow-up wipe-down is normal.

items.question: What should I prepare before the team arrives?
items.answer: Ensure renovation is fully completed, remove large debris (or ask if disposal is needed), provide access to water and electricity, keep the house vacant if possible, and clear personal belongings for easier cleaning.

items.question: Do you clean aircons after renovation?
items.answer: Aircon cleaning is a separate service. Renovation can cause dust buildup inside aircon units, so a post-reno AC cleaning is highly recommended.

items.question: Are your cleaning chemicals safe?
items.answer: Yes. We use safe, non-toxic, and effective cleaning solutions. Heavy-duty products are only used when necessary.

items.question: What is NOT included in post-renovation cleaning?
items.answer: Common exclusions: removal of large construction debris, polishing or waxing of floors, steam cleaning of upholstery, high ladder work above safety height, pest control, and AC servicing. These can be added as optional add-ons.

items.question: Do you guarantee the results?
items.answer: We guarantee best-effort cleaning and will handle your property with care. However, certain marks or damages caused by renovation may not be removable.
